title: thelypteris rohanica
intro: Thelypteris rohanica, also known as Rohan's maidenhair fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Thelypteris rohanica include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Thelypteris rohanica can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are often used in traditional medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
